observation.zh: 底色、面板、边框、强调色已映射到 CSS token
observation.en: Background, panels, borders, and accent mapped to CSS tokens

observation.zh: 导航、按钮、卡片、表格、代码块均有状态说明
observation.en: Navigation, buttons, cards, tables, and code blocks have state notes

observation.zh: 390px 下按钮换行、表格滚动、侧栏收起
observation.en: At 390px, buttons wrap, tables scroll, sidebar collapses

observation.zh: 品牌名、真实数值、图片和原文案均未进入规格
observation.en: Brand names, real numbers, images, and original copy are not in the spec

zh: 人工检查 1440x1000 截图：导航、主内容、证据表、按钮无重叠。
人工检查 390x900 截图：无页面级横向溢出，长命令可读。
rg -n "目标品牌名|真实业务词" implementation-spec.md component-checklist.md
en: Manually inspect 1440x1000 screenshots: nav, content, evidence table, and buttons have no overlap.
Manually inspect 390x900 screenshots: no page-level horizontal overflow and long commands remain readable.
rg -n "target brand|real business term" implementation-spec.md component-checklist.md

zh: 截图不能证明交互状态，缺失状态必须标为待确认。
规格只写可实现信息，不臆测业务规则。
实现后必须用同一视口重新截图对比。
en: Screenshots cannot prove interaction states, so missing states must be marked for confirmation.
The spec records implementable details, not guessed business rules.
After implementation, recapture the same viewports for comparison.

trigger.zh: 只有目标截图和当前页面截图，需要转成开发可执行的组件规格。
trigger.en: Only target and current screenshots were available, requiring an implementable component specification.

firstSignal.zh: 截图里按钮、筛选栏和表格密度没有文字规格。
firstSignal.en: Buttons, filters, and table density were visible in screenshots but lacked written specs.

doneSignal.zh: 输出 8 个组件、5 个状态、3 个断点的实现清单。
doneSignal.en: The output included an implementation checklist for eight components, five states, and three breakpoints.
